'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=FGt2GO4OffVoO1NvbVErMbVaRc0aLhIY5.bZt2mPoSM-1774222845-1.0.1.1-1D6tdkwSfg7da8tGdxULTBjc0NG.Z4aAUH2bD1ybmrc"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
